metadata.author: PhysWorldLM Example Generator
metadata.description: Blue Carrier Strike Group escorts a logistics convoy in the Indian Ocean. Red naval task force attempts interdiction using submarines, anti-ship missiles, and maritime patrol aircraft. Blue responds with destroyers, frigates, carrier aircraft, ASW helicopters, UAVs, and electronic warfare. Scenario exercises every PhysWorldLM subsystem.

entities.name: USS Constellation (CVN-99)
entities.label: TRIDENT-1
entities.description: Nimitz-class aircraft carrier, Blue fleet flagship.

entities.name: PLAN Wing Loong II Recon UAV
entities.label: STORM-UAV

missions.name: Escort Logistics Convoy
missions.primary_objective: Protect USNS Rainier and deliver cargo safely to port.
secondary_objectives: Maintain air superiority over convoy corridor
Destroy or deter Red naval forces

missions.name: Anti-Submarine Warfare Screen
missions.primary_objective: Detect, track, and neutralize Red submarine threat.

missions.name: Maritime ISR Patrol
missions.primary_objective: Establish wide-area maritime picture; track Red surface and air contacts.

missions.name: Sink Blue Carrier Strike Group
missions.primary_objective: Destroy CVN flagship and supply ship.

timeline.label: Red sub detects convoy on passive sonar
Blue DDG-A sonar contact — possible submarine
Blue ESM detects missile launch signature
Red missile boat launches YJ-12 salvo
EW jamming activated — DRFM jammer on
Red sub launches two Yu-6 torpedoes at supply ship
Red sub deploys acoustic decoys after launch
Seahawk dipping sonar acquires sub contact
Seahawk drops Mk54 torpedo on sub
F/A-18E strikes Red destroyer with Harpoon

events.notes: All Blue entities spawn at sim start
Red sub passive sonar detects convoy engine noise
Blue DDG-A towed array — probable sub contact
Blue DDG-A SPY-1D radar locks Red destroyer
Red DD launches 4x YJ-18 ASM at Blue CSG
ESM detects YJ-18 seeker activation — launch warning
Blue DDG-A fires 6x SM-2 in response
SM-2 kills 3 of 4 YJ-18; one leaker continues
YJ-18 leaker impacts DDG-A amidships
DDG-A damaged: engine room flooding, speed reduced
Red missile boat fires 8x YJ-12 saturating salvo
Red activates DRFM jamming to confuse Blue SAM seekers
Red sub fires 2x Yu-6 heavyweight torpedoes
MH-60R dipping sonar acquires sub 4000m below, locks firing solution
Seahawk drops Mk 54 torpedo
Mk 54 detonates beneath Red sub — kills submarine
Red submarine sunk
F/A-18E launches 2x AGM-84 Harpoon at Red destroyer
Harpoon strikes Red destroyer amidships — severe damage
Remaining Red forces retreat at best speed
Convoy delivered. Operation Trident Shield concluded.
